indication: IMBRUVICA is a kinase inhibitor indicated for the treatment of adult patients with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) / Small lymphocytic lymphoma (SLL) with 17p deletion.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) granted approval to ibrutinib for the treatment of adult patients with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) / Small lymphocytic lymphoma (SLL) with a 17p deletion.
raw_cancer_type: chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) / Small lymphocytic lymphoma (SLL)

document.name: Imbruvica (ibrutinib) [package insert]. FDA.
